news.summary: France and Britain will co-host a video conference Friday of countries ready to contribute to a "purely defensive mission" to secure the Strait of Hormuz. news.headline: Turkiye grieves students killed in school shooting
news.summary: Hundreds turned out to the funerals of eight students who were fatally shot at school in Turkiye’s Kahramanmaras.
